# PairCheck output

## Meta

- **Contract ref**: _task # from sprint-output.md_
- **Reviewer**: PairCheck-A | PairCheck-B
- **Date**: YYYY-MM-DD

## Verdict

**pass** | **fail** | **partial**

## Checklist

- [ ] Requirements fit — output matches the task contract
- [ ] Correctness — technically sound
- [ ] Consistency — aligns with existing repo artifacts
- [ ] Token efficiency — not unnecessarily verbose
- [ ] Public safety — nothing harmful if published
- [ ] Mission alignment — supports `docs/core/mission.md`
